DTR  |  Listen to a Classroom Conversation
LCC-MS8-MSMATH8-RWS-IFN-01 | MS Math 8 | Irrational Numbers and Rational Approximations | Real-World Simulation | Indigenous & First Nations Knowledge

The Dance Circle

Click  🎧  to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a girl and a boy. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer some questions.
Listen to the Conversation
1QUESTION 1: What are the girl and the boy planning?
2QUESTION 2: Where did the boy learn to use twenty-two over seven?
3QUESTION 3: Why does the boy decide to order ninety-five feet of rope when the math gives about eighty-eight?
Choose the best answer for each question. You may change your answers before submitting.
Answer all 3 questions to submit.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. How does the way the girl talks at the start tell you what kind of task they are working on? How does the boy's answer about his grandpa and auntie shape where his method really comes from?
CA ELD PI.A.1, PI.A.3, PI.B.5 | CCSS Math 8.NS.A.2 | MS Math 8
